spec: Build BR-30B4A DXLink SDK Contract Correction and Runtime Preflight. Preserve the verified BR-30B2 OAuth exchange, BR-30B3 account and quote-token REST parsing, exact SPY and QQQ allowlist, read-only capability firewall, stdin-only ephemeral quote-token transport, bounded subprocess execution, and all disabled-state guarantees. Construct the client with exactly new DXLinkWebSocketClient(). Call client.connect(dxlinkUrl) with the authenticated provider-returned WSS endpoint and call client.setAuthToken(quoteToken). Do not place the URL in the constructor and do not call connect without the URL. Construct the feed with exactly two arguments using new DXLinkFeed(client, FeedContract.AUTO).
